name: Poverty Point
landform: Macon Ridge (Pleistocene terrace) at boundary with Mississippi alluvial valley
coord_source: Published location (Gibson 2000); Bayou Macon adjacent to eastern margin of Macon Ridge

name: Lower Jackson
landform: Macon Ridge ~2 km south of Poverty Point earthworks
coord_source: Derived from Saunders et al. 2001 description (~2 km S of PP); displaced from PP by 0.019 deg lat
site_source: Saunders et al. 2001 (Southeastern Archaeology 20:67); Ortmann and Kidder 2013

name: Watson Brake
landform: Pleistocene (Prairie) terrace overlooking Ouachita River floodplain
coord_source: Published location N-NW of Monroe LA on Prairie terrace per Saunders et al. 1997 site description
site_source: Saunders et al. 1997 (Science 277:1796); Saunders et al. 2005 (American Antiquity 70:631)

name: Frenchman's Bend
landform: Pleistocene terrace; Bayou Desiard drainage near Monroe LA
coord_source: Bayou Desiard locale near Monroe per Saunders Allen Saucier 1994 site description
site_source: Saunders Allen Saucier 1994 (Southeastern Archaeology 13:134); Saunders et al. 2005

name: Caney
landform: Macon Ridge / Sicily Island Hills vicinity
coord_source: Sicily Island Hills locale per Saunders Allen Jones Swoveland 2000 (Catahoula Parish location)

name: Insley
coord_source: Franklin Parish on Macon Ridge per Sassaman 2005:340-341 and Girard and McGimsey 2022 LCAP
site_source: Sassaman 2005:340-341; Girard and McGimsey 2022 (Louisiana Comprehensive Archaeological Plan)

name: Cowpen Slough
coord_source: Boeuf River margin Catahoula Parish per Ramenofsky and Mires 1985 site files
site_source: Ramenofsky and Mires 1985 (LA Division of Archaeology); Kidder and Grooms 2024

name: J.W. Copes
coord_source: Madison Parish (NOT Tensas Parish) per Jackson 1982a title and Jackson 1990; trinomial 16TE2 belongs to Osceola in Tensas Parish
site_source: Jackson 1981 (Louisiana Archaeology 8:73); Jackson 1990 (North American Archaeologist 10:173); Kidder and Grooms 2024

name: Jaketown
landform: Yazoo Basin; abandoned Mississippi River meander belt near Belzoni MS
coord_source: Near Belzoni MS in Humphreys County per Ford Phillips Haag 1955; Phillips Ford Griffin 1951:273; Haag and Webb 1953
site_source: Ford Phillips Haag 1955; Ward et al. 2022

name: Claiborne
coord_source: Pearl River mouth lower estuary per Bruseth 1991 and Sassaman and Brookes 2017
site_source: Bruseth 1991; Sassaman and Brookes 2017 (American Antiquity 82:781); Kidder Baumgartel and Bruseth 2025

name: Cedarland
landform: Pearl River mouth; semicircular oyster shell midden adjacent to Claiborne
coord_source: Adjacent to Claiborne 22HA501 per Gagliano and Webb 1975; Bruseth 1991
site_source: Gagliano and Webb 1975; Bruseth 1991; Kidder Baumgartel and Bruseth 2025
